value.found_quote:
Use `/agent` in the CLI to switch between active agent threads and inspect the ongoing thread.
- Ask Codex directly to steer a running subagent, stop it, or close completed agent threads.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes subagent management capabilities under the "Managing subagents" section. It states users can switch between active agent threads (via `/agent` in the CLI) and can ask Codex to steer, stop, or close running/completed subagents. This directly matches all three elements of the claim: switching between active agent threads, steering running subagents, and stopping or closing them. The feature is described as currently available (not preview/beta), as subagent workflows are enabled by default in current Codex releases.
